title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Go CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with a built-in model library and OpenAI-compatible API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, and pull models via Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama; use local models as LLMs, chat, or embedding backends in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama comparable to ChatGPT: chat history, model management, multi-user, dark mode, and OpenAI-compatible API proxy.

title: ollama-cli (sugarforever/ollama-cli)
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with conversation memory, syntax highlighting, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot (github-copilot-ollama)
summary: Unofficial GitHub Copilot plugin that routes completions through a local Ollama model instead of OpenAI.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama4j (Java client)
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama exposing chat, generate, pull, and list APIs with reactive streaming.

title: ollama-rag (privateGPT-ollama)
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation stack using Ollama for local LLM and embeddings, Chroma for vector store, and LangChain for orchestration.

title: ollama-agents (crewAI-ollama)
summary: Example repo showing how to plug Ollama models into CrewAI autonomous agents framework.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node that adds Ollama chat and generate actions to no-code workflows.

title: ollama-obsidian (obsidian-ollama)
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from within notes for summarization, translation, or brainstorming.

title: ollama-haystack (haystack-ollama)
summary: Deep-set Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for Haystack 2.0 pipelines.

title: ollama-rs (Rust client)
summary: Unofficial async Rust crate for Ollama with chat, generate, embeddings, and model management endpoints.

title: ollama-csharp (dotnet client)
summary: .NET library and CLI for Ollama supporting chat, generate, and model operations with IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-docker-compose (awesome-ollama)
summary: Curated list of Ollama tools, integrations, tutorials, and community projects organized by category.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Lightweight Discord bot that answers users via a local Ollama model with slash commands and conversation memory.

title: ollama-nginx (ollama-reverse-proxy)
summary: Nginx configuration and Docker setup for exposing Ollama securely behind HTTPS with rate limiting and auth headers.

title: ollama-powershell (ps-ollama)
summary: PowerShell module that wraps Ollama REST APIs for chat and generate with pipeline support.
